task: Can you help me make a super simple plan for tomorrow morning? I’ve got school stuff, a backpack to get ready, and a couple things I don’t want to forget, and I want it laid out in a way that’s easy to follow.

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here’s a super simple morning plan you can follow:

### Tomorrow Morning Plan
1. **Wake up**
2. **Get dressed**
3. **Eat breakfast**
4. **Pack school stuff**
5. **Check backpack**
   - homework
   - books
   - charger
   - water bottle
   - anything else you need
6. **Grab the things you don’t want to forget**
7. **Put on shoes / jacket**
8. **Head out**

If you want, I can also turn this into a **checklist version** you can copy straight into your notes.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, close. Make it even more exact, like with a quick order for the backpack stuff and the forgetful things separate. Also put it in checklist form, not just a list. I want it super easy to just read and do.

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here’s a super simple **checklist** with the backpack stuff and the “don’t forget” things separated:

## Tomorrow Morning Checklist

- [ ] Wake up  
- [ ] Get dressed  
- [ ] Eat breakfast  
- [ ] Get backpack ready  

### Backpack stuff
- [ ] Homework  
- [ ] Books  
- [ ] Charger  
- [ ] Water bottle  
- [ ] Any school papers  

### Don’t forget
- [ ] Keys  
- [ ] Phone  
- [ ] Wallet / money  
- [ ] Lunch  
- [ ] Any special item you need  

- [ ] Put on shoes  
- [ ] Put on jacket  
- [ ] Leave  

If you want, I can make it even shorter and more “tiny checklist” style.

user_simulator.text:
Closer, but switch it to my actual stuff. I’m 11, so no wallet. And I don’t need a phone or keys for school.

Make it like this:

- [ ] Wake up
- [ ] Get dressed
- [ ] Eat breakfast
- [ ] Pack backpack
  - [ ] homework
  - [ ] folder / papers
  - [ ] books
  - [ ] water bottle
  - [ ] charger if I need it
- [ ] Grab don’t-forget stuff
  - [ ] lunch
  - [ ] library book if I have it
  - [ ] anything for class
- [ ] Shoes on
- [ ] Jacket on if needed
- [ ] Leave

That’s the kind of exact order I meant. Simple and no extra stuff.

turns.agent_response:
Absolutely — here it is in that exact simple checklist style:

- [ ] Wake up
- [ ] Get dressed
- [ ] Eat breakfast
- [ ] Pack backpack
  - [ ] homework
  - [ ] folder / papers
  - [ ] books
  - [ ] water bottle
  - [ ] charger if I need it
- [ ] Grab don’t-forget stuff
  - [ ] lunch
  - [ ] library book if I have it
  - [ ] anything for class
- [ ] Shoes on
- [ ] Jacket on if needed
- [ ] Leave

If you want, I can also make this into a **super tiny version** with even fewer words.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Exactly what I wanted.
